mnemonics: Optimize Linear Learning (OLL): Organize materials, Link concepts, Leverage practice
Resource Recall (RR): Read actively, Review regularly, Reinforce with problems
keyPoints: Focus on textbooks and lecture notes for foundational theory
Utilize online platforms (e.g., Khan Academy, MIT OCW) for visual explanations and worked examples
Practice with problem sets and past exams to apply optimization techniques
commonMistakes: Relying solely on passive reading without active problem-solving
Skipping the underlying linear algebra concepts and jumping directly to algorithms
Not verifying the dimensions and constraints when setting up an optimization problem
